description: Debugger + cross-compartment wrapper UAF / assertion after nukeAllCCWs. CVE-2026-0884 (MFSA 2026-01). Pre-fix, Compartment::wrap in js/src/proxy/CrossCompartmentWrapper.cpp refused to (re)create CCWs to debugger instances after nukeAllCCWs(), but the Debugger machinery continued to drive debug events (debugger statement, breakpoint hit, recomputeWrappers) that tried to wrap debugger objects. The wrap refusal propagated as a failed AutoRealm / assertion in debug builds; under the additional recomputeWrappers() + gc() pattern it surfaced as heap-use-after-free on a freed Debugger object. The fix (commit 0264cf850afd91cdd3956066e0b00b982566f684, 2025-12-08, Phabricator D275046, 'Continue to allow creation of CCWs to debugger instances after CCWs have been nuked') permits CCW creation for debugger targets even post-nuke, restoring Compartment::wrap invariants. Tests landed at js/src/jit-test/tests/debug/bug-2003588.js and bug-2003809.js.

fixes.description: Bug 2003588 - Continue to allow creation of CCWs to debugger
